headline: How GM’s Tennessee Battery Pivot and Training Push At General Motors (GM) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Earlier this quarter, V2X, Inc. extended its multi-year partnership with General Motors through 2030 in a contract worth over US$100 million, continuing to provide technical training for more than 40,000 service technicians and apprentices annually across nearly 4,000 U.S. dealerships. This long-running training partnership underpins GM’s capability to service increasingly complex vehicles, linking workforce skills directly to customer satisfaction and aftersales performance. We’ll now...

headline: GM CFO Shrugs Off Imminent Gas Price Worries

headline: Trump’s tariffs are hurting American manufacturers instead of helping them
summary: Jay Allen is a fan of President Donald Trump, and voted for him on the belief that the Republican would cut taxes and trim regulations, helping his manufacturing business in northeast Arkansas.  The import taxes have raised the costs of engines, steel, gearboxes and clutches made abroad that Allen needs to build power trowels that can sell for up to $100,000 each.  Allen’s experience embodies a growing body of evidence that the tariffs that Trump said would help American factories are, in fact, squashing many of them.

raw.headline: Trump’s tariffs are hurting American manufacturers instead of helping them
raw.summary: Jay Allen is a fan of President Donald Trump, and voted for him on the belief that the Republican would cut taxes and trim regulations, helping his manufacturing business in northeast Arkansas. Allen’s experience embodies a growing body of evidence that the tariffs that Trump said would help American factories are, in fact, squashing many of them.
